name: ccais-embedded-chatbot
description: Reusable embedded chatbot SDK with framework wrappers and a secure backend proxy.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-core && npm run build --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-server && npm run build --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-react && npm run build --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-angular
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-core && npm run lint --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-server && npm run lint --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-react && npm run lint --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-angular
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-react && npm run typecheck --workspace @ccais/embedded-chatbot-angular
